latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all shipping through Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars: 'I told him don't do that'
latest_news.text: Trump confirms he neither agreed with nor approved Israel's South Pars strike. 'We get along great. It's coordinated, but on occasion he'll do something.' Daylight between the two leaders visible for first time.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 06: IMMINENT. Ground invasion ongoing, 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Litani operations. No ceasefire signals. Updated 2026-03-20T05:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 06. Netanyahu first mentions 'ground component' for Iran — elevates ground invasion rhetoric. Israel strikes Tehran on Nowruz. Iran death toll 1,444. Iran MPs push Hormuz tolls legislation. No de-escalation signals in any active theater.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Tehran on Nowruz; Netanyahu suggests 'ground component' needed for Iran 'revolution'
latest_news.text: Israel pounds Tehran with airstrikes as Iranians mark Nowruz. Netanyahu says Iran being 'decimated,' can no longer enrich uranium or build missiles, but a 'revolution' in the country would require a 'ground component.' Also denies 'dragging' Trump into war, calls Trump 'the leader.'

latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all shipping through Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Death toll: 1,444 dead in Iran, 18 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 21 in Gulf states — Day 20
latest_news.text: Preliminary death toll Day 20: 1,444 dead in Iran from US-Israeli strikes, at least 18 killed in Israel from Iranian attacks, 13 US soldiers killed, 21 killed across Gulf states.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Iranian Navy in Caspian Sea — first time war extends to Caspian
latest_news.text: IAF strikes hit 200+ targets in northern Iran including Iranian Navy vessels in Caspian Sea. 4 missile boats, 1 corvette destroyed at Bandar Anzali. Unprecedented geographic expansion.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 05:00 UTC) — Netanyahu floats 'ground component' for Iran war (regime change via ground invasion). Israel strikes Tehran on Nowruz. 1,444 dead in Iran, 18 in Israel, 13 US troops, 21 Gulf states. Caspian Sea strikes unprecedented. Iran MPs propose Hormuz tolls/axes legislation. Trump-Netanyahu rift on South Pars visible. Gabbard testimony contradicts war justification. Brent settled $108.65. Saudi patience 'not unlimited.' Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding. Russia-Ukraine talks paused. No new conflict zones.
